caption: A man with short brown hair, wearing a gray suit jacket, a white dress shirt, and a patterned blue tie, speaks while gesturing with his hands. He is positioned in front of a white backdrop featuring the hashtag "#BigDataSV" and the year "2015." In the first frame, he has his right hand raised near his chest and his left arm extended outward. As the sequence progresses, he continues to speak, moving his hands to emphasize his points. A blue graphic overlay appears on the right side of the screen, displaying the text "JEFF KELLY | @jeffreyfkelly," "Senior Analyst," and "Wikbon." In the lower-left corner of the final frames, a small logo for "NFO-OBJECTS" is visible alongside the text "SPONSORED BY." The man remains the central focus, captured from the waist up, against the branded event background.
